svg.text: Core, compliance, owner follow-up, documents, analytics, notifications and billing

g.text: - Legal role and portal visibility are separate concepts.
- Owners can confirm or decline pending obligations without closing compliance.
- Documents visible to owners depend on DOCUMENTS.is_visible_to_owner.
- Billing and debt tables must never be exposed to owners.
- SNAPSHOT supports fast reporting and trends.
- SESSIONS and CENTER_CAPACITY model real demand and saturation.
- DATA_QUALITY_ISSUES captures reliability gaps for review.
Charges start in SERVICE_ORDERS, become receivables, then payments and account movements keep the balance traceable.
Batch items contain the vehicle-level payload to send.
Notification log stores the delivery trace per channel.
- VERIFICATION_OBLIGATIONS models what is pending, confirmed, scheduled, overdue or completed.
- Owner decisions are visible to administration on the same record, without duplicating capture.
- VERIFICATION_EVENTS remains the source of truth for a verification that was actually performed.
- The model links obligations to VEHICLES, USERS, VERIFICATION_CENTERS and optionally the final VERIFICATION_EVENT.
